What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A small tan and white dog stands on a black textured mat while a person uses an electric nail grinder on its paw. The dog stands inside a white bathtub secured by a purple leash attached from above. A person wearing a ring holds a black hose to spray water on the dog's fur. The dog's front paws rest on the rim of the tub during washing.
